raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The section advances a specific methodological contribution claim (self-correcting scheme as an adaptive trust-region variant); verifying the conceptual framing is coherent and accurately scoped is central under any review interpretation.","R1.2":"The argument chain—feedback signal → local curvature proxy → descent quality → empirical alignment—must hold together logically; gaps or non-sequiturs between these steps would undermine the section regardless of review type.","R1.3":"Quantitative empirical claims are made (24 benchmarks, 'majority', 'modest improvement') without grounding visible in this excerpt; checking that claims do not outrun the evidence presented is a central expected responsibility.","R1.6":"The prose exhibits pervasive and stacked hedging ('tentatively interpret', 'seems to indicate', 'may offer a potentially useful direction') that cumulatively degrades communicative precision; prose quality is at minimum a central expected responsibility under any 'review' delegation."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should this review prioritize scientific/technical soundness—logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty positioning—or writing/editorial quality—prose clarity, hedge calibration, and sentence-level revision?"}

rationale.R1.1: The section advances a specific methodological contribution claim (self-correcting scheme as an adaptive trust-region variant); verifying the conceptual framing is coherent and accurately scoped is central under any review interpretation.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain—feedback signal → local curvature proxy → descent quality → empirical alignment—must hold together logically; gaps or non-sequiturs between these steps would undermine the section regardless of review type.
rationale.R1.3: Quantitative empirical claims are made (24 benchmarks, 'majority', 'modest improvement') without grounding visible in this excerpt; checking that claims do not outrun the evidence presented is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: The prose exhibits pervasive and stacked hedging ('tentatively interpret', 'seems to indicate', 'may offer a potentially useful direction') that cumulatively degrades communicative precision; prose quality is at minimum a central expected responsibility under any 'review' delegation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should this review prioritize scientific/technical soundness—logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, and novelty positioning—or writing/editorial quality—prose clarity, hedge calibration, and sentence-level revision?
